title: Order-reversing: theta2 >> theta1 iff theta1' >> theta2'

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Prove that $\Phi$ reverses the quotient order on $\Dr(M)$:
$$\theta_2 \twoheadrightarrow \theta_1 \iff \theta_1' \twoheadrightarrow \theta_2',$$
equivalently $\Trop\theta_2 \supseteq \Trop\theta_1 \iff \Trop\theta_1' \supseteq \Trop\theta_2'$.

Requires the cryptomorphic (flat-coordinate) form of the **tropical incidence–Plücker relations**
characterizing the quotient relation, and a proof that $\perp$ reverses these incidence relations,
again via the De Morgan / rank-complement identities. State the incidence–Plücker relations
explicitly (they are referenced as eqn:incidence-plucker but not displayed) before using them.
